'''âg-y-g''' ('''kagayag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbarb|unbarb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbarb|unbarb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-y-g
|-
! Lemma
| kagayag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigayag|thigayag]] || [[word:jigayag|jigayag]] || [[word:shigayag|shigayag]] || [[word:kigayag|kigayag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugayag|thuthugayag]] || [[word:jujugayag|jujugayag]] || [[word:shushugayag|shushugayag]] || [[word:kukugayag|kukugayag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugayag|thugayag]] || [[word:jugayag|jugayag]] || [[word:shugayag|shugayag]] || [[word:kugayag|kugayag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugayag|thugayag]] || [[word:jugayag|jugayag]] || [[word:shugayag|shugayag]] || [[word:kugayag|kugayag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegayag|thegayag]] || [[word:jegayag|jegayag]] || [[word:shegayag|shegayag]] || [[word:kegayag|kegayag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogayag|thothogayag]] || [[word:jojogayag|jojogayag]] || [[word:shoshogayag|shoshogayag]] || [[word:kokogayag|kokogayag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogayag|thogayag]] || [[word:jogayag|jogayag]] || [[word:shogayag|shogayag]] || [[word:kogayag|kogayag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogayag|thogayag]] || [[word:jogayag|jogayag]] || [[word:shogayag|shogayag]] || [[word:kogayag|kogayag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgayag|thĂŠgayag]] || [[word:jĂŠgayag|jĂŠgayag]] || [[word:shĂŠgayag|shĂŠgayag]] || [[word:kĂŠgayag|kĂŠgayag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagayag|thathagayag]] || [[word:jajagayag|jajagayag]] || [[word:shashagayag|shashagayag]] || [[word:kakagayag|kakagayag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagayag|thagayag]] || [[word:jagayag|jagayag]] || [[word:shagayag|shagayag]] || [[word:kagayag|kagayag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagayag|thagayag]] || [[word:jagayag|jagayag]] || [[word:shagayag|shagayag]] || [[word:kagayag|kagayag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagayag|shagayag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagayag|goshagayag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagayag|gokishagayag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagayagnĂŒ|shagayagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagayagnknĂŒ|goshagayagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayagnĂŒ|gokishagayagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagayagshĂ«|shagayagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagayagnkshĂ«|goshagayagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagayagshĂ«|gokishagayagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayagro|shagayagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayagnkro|goshagayagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayagro|gokishagayagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayagmu|shagayagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayagnkmu|goshagayagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayagmu|gokishagayagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagayagsher|shagayagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagayagnksher|goshagayagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagayagsher|gokishagayagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagayagng|shagayagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagayagnkng|goshagayagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagayagng|gokishagayagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagayagya|shagayagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagayagnkya|goshagayagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagayagya|gokishagayagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagayagyam|shagayagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagayagnkyam|goshagayagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagayagyam|gokishagayagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayagnĂŒshĂ«|shagayagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagayagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagayagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayagnĂŒro|shagayagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayagnknĂŒro|goshagayagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayagnĂŒro|gokishagayagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayagnĂŒmu|shagayagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayagnknĂŒmu|goshagayagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayagnĂŒmu|gokishagayagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayagshĂ«nĂŒ|shagayagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagayagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagayagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayagshĂ«ro|shagayagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayagnkshĂ«ro|goshagayagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayagshĂ«ro|gokishagayagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayagshĂ«mu|shagayagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayagnkshĂ«mu|goshagayagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayagshĂ«mu|gokishagayagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayagronĂŒ|shagayagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayagnkronĂŒ|goshagayagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayagronĂŒ|gokishagayagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayagroshĂ«|shagayagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayagnkroshĂ«|goshagayagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayagroshĂ«|gokishagayagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayagromu|shagayagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayagnkromu|goshagayagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayagromu|gokishagayagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayagmunĂŒ|shagayagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayagnkmunĂŒ|goshagayagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayagmunĂŒ|gokishagayagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayagmushĂ«|shagayagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayagnkmushĂ«|goshagayagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayagmushĂ«|gokishagayagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayagmuro|shagayagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayagnkmuro|goshagayagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayagmuro|gokishagayagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
